message:
Fix platform casing in install script

The `uname -s` command returns "Linux" with a capital L, but the release
packages use lowercase "linux" in their filenames. This caused the install
script to construct invalid URLs.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,7 +83,7 @@ elif [ -z "${os}" ]; then
   echo "Could not identify package_format."
   exit 1
 fi
-platform="${arch}-${os}"
+platform="${arch}-$(echo "${os}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"
 
 echo "Found ${platform} (${package_format})."
